name: linSetSchedulerJitter
title: linSetSchedulerJitter
syntax: long linSetSchedulerJitter (long mode, long jitterInMicSecs); // form 2
description: Sets/resets the jitter mode and the jitter of the LIN hardware scheduler. (the channel is determined by the CAPL program context).

parameters.name: mode
parameters.description: 0: deactivates the jitter; 1: sets the min-/max-mode; the minimum (0) and the maximum (specified value) jitter will be used alternatively 2: sets the random jitter-mode; the jitter-offset will be equally distributed in the min/max range

parameters.name: jitterInMicSecs
parameters.description: The jitter in microseconds to be used. Default: Jitter value from LDF.

return: On success, a value unequal to zero, otherwise zero.
availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
